### https://www.linkedin.com/posts/stephan-c-komladzei-64397775_livercancerresearch-machinelearning-biostatistics-activity-7182847557448990720-G8Ux
...
At this year’s Student Research Forum (SRF), hosted by University of Kansas Medical Center , I had the honor of presenting a poster and an oral talk on my ongoing research topic “Intergrative Machine Learning Approach in Detecting Gene Networks for Predicting Liver Cancer Incidence and Survival.” Our innovative machine learning approach seeks to identify novel biomarker genes and predictive gene networks in liver cancer detection, since the disease is characterized by late detection and diagnosis, and early diagnosis is crucial for a higher chance of survival. 
The forum’s insightful and constructive feedback exchange has motivated us in various ways to improve our work. 

I extend my heartfelt gratitude to my mentors Dr. Yanming Li and Dr. Sardiu Mihaela E., PhD and colleagues Murshalina Akhter and Md. Tamzid Islam for their unwavering support. #LiverCancerResearch #MachineLearning #Biostatistics #DataScience

results.title: Financial Analyst 1 – Augustana College
highlights:
Financial Analyst 1 – Augustana College
...
Atmos Energy Corporation
...
# Financial Analyst 1
...
Primary Duties1.Conducts basic financial analyses and research in such areas as revenue and expense performance, capital spending, and labor cap rates. Knows and uses fundamental financial analysis concepts and procedures.2. Retrieves data from company databases and reporting systems. Compiles data and prepares routine and ad hoc reports, graphs and presentations for management. May assist in developing more complex reports and financial models under the direction of senior financial staff. Reviews reports for accuracy and completeness.3. Assists with revenue and expense forecasts, and projections of capital spending and rate base.4. Interfaces with internal partners such as Operations, Engineering, Marketing, Rates & Regulatory and Corporate Accounting when gathering financial information for budgets and forecasts.5. Participates in annual budget development process.6. Supports higher level staff in identification and recommendation of financial options or strategies when evaluating business opportunities.7. Conducts audits of financial records. Recognizes missing or incomplete information and inconsistencies or anomalies in financial research. Resolves readily identifiable, clearly-defined problems8. Prepares journal entries as needed.9. May oversee, audit, and support the administration of P-Card and T&E Card activities on behalf of the division.
...
MINIMUM REQUIREMENTSEducational/Experience LevelRequires Bachelor’s degree in Finance, Accounting, and/or Economics; or equivalent.
...
Numeric Skills:Requires the ability to perform analyses using basic to moderately complex statistical, financial and accounting methods and practices.
...
Computer Skills:Requires ability to utilize the Company’s database systems and available resources for data entry, reference and/or retrieval tasks.Requires proficient knowledge of various software applications such as Microsoft Word, Excel, Access and PowerPoint to create routine financial documents, reports, graphs and presentations.

results.title: Kevin Raj
highlights:
Sr. Data Integrity Analyst at Atmos Energy
...
Data Integrity Analyst at [
...
I am a Sr. Data Integrity Analyst at Atmos Energy, which is one of the largest natural gas only utility distributors in the US. I work in their Pipeline Safety Group, where I utilize data analytics tools such as Alteryx and Tableau to extract data from multiple compliance systems and create executive level dashboards to assist in decision making and ensure our pipelines are operating as safe as possible. I have also been learning how to program in Python and have a working proficiency in querying databases using SQL and am currently pursuing my Master's in Artificial Intelligence at the University of North Texas. Previously, I worked as a Business Support Specialist and Financial Analyst at Atmos Energy where I was responsible for forecasting dollars spent on capital pipeline projects and creating operational/capital budgets for my business unit. I have a Bachelors degree in Economics with a Business minor from UT Austin, and a Masters degree in Accounting from UT Dallas. I am also a licensed CPA in the state of Texas and am well versed in accounting principles and business fundamentals. To improve my technical skills, I completed the Graduate Certificate in Business Analytics program at SMU and have completed project-based "Nanodegrees" online with Udacity in Predictive Analytics for Business and Programming in Data Science where I learned how to program in Python, SQL, and using Git for version control.. I am continuously interested in improving my technical skills to add value to my organization. You can view my projects completed for Udacity and current projects I'm working on my GitHub:
...

results.title: Senior AI/ML Engineer at Jobgether - United State | Visa Sponsorship Jobs
highlights:
# Senior AI/ML Engineer
...
We are seeking a highly skilled AI/ML Engineer to develop advanced AI and ML solutions for the energy and utility sector. The ideal candidate will have a strong background in machine learning engineering, AI systems design, and large-scale data-driven decision-making. The role requires collaboration with cross-functional teams to design, build, and deploy scalable machine learning systems.
...
Develop AI and ML solutions for the energy and utility sector
...
Collaborate with cross-functional teams to design, develop, and deploy scalable AI and machine learning solutions integrated into production systems
...
Build reusable Python libraries and engineering components to support ML pipelines, data processing workflows, and AI system development
...
Python AWS Azure GCP Databricks LangChain LangGraph LlamaIndex Hugging Face AutoGen
...
This position is posted by Jobgether on behalf of a partner company. We are currently looking for an AI / ML Engineer in the United States.This role sits at the intersection of machine learning engineering, AI systems design, and large-scale data-driven decision-making, focused on solving complex challenges in the energy and utility sector. You will contribute to the development of advanced AI and ML solutions that combine predictive modeling, optimization, and generative AI to support critical infrastructure and sustainability goals. Working closely with data scientists and software engineers, you will help design, build, and deploy scalable machine learning systems that power real-world applications. The environment is highly collaborative and innovation-driven, with a strong emphasis on applied AI, production readiness, and measurable impact. You will work across diverse use cases including forecasting, geospatial analysis, and intelligent decision systems. This is a high-impact role where your work directly supports the modernization and efficiency of energy systems.Accountabilities
...
- Collaborate with cross-functional teams to design, develop, and deploy scalable AI and machine learning solutions integrated into production systems.
...
- Build reusable Python libraries and engineering components to support ML pipelines, data processing workflows, and AI system development.
...
- Contribute to the design and implementation of modern AI architectures, including RAG systems, LLM integrations, and agent-based workflows.
...
- Develop frameworks for
...
, including reasoning
...
- Support database design and optimization, including writing efficient queries for large-scale data processing and retrieval.
...
- Stay current with advancements in machine learning engineering, generative AI, and AI orchestration, integrating best practices into workflows.
...
- Master’s degree in Computer Science, Data Science, Software Engineering, or related field (PhD preferred).
...
- 7+ years of experience building, deploying, and maintaining machine learning systems in production environments.
...
- Strong proficiency in Python, including experience building reusable packages and scalable data pipelines.
...
- Hands-on experience with cloud platforms such as AWS, Azure, or GCP, including CI/CD and containerized deployments.
...
- Solid understanding of ML system design, MLOps principles, and end-to-end model lifecycle management.
...
- Experience with distributed computing frameworks and relational/non-relational databases.
...
- Familiarity with Databricks and large-scale data processing environments.
...
- Experience working with generative AI frameworks such as LangChain, LangGraph, LlamaIndex, Hugging Face, or AutoGen.
...
- Exposure to agentic AI systems, AI orchestration, or LLM-based decision workflows is highly desirable.
...
- Nice to have: experience in the utility, energy, or power sector and strong Databricks expertise.

### Siemens Energy AI/Machine Learning Engineer Jobs 2026 | Entry-Level & Graduate Hiring
...
Siemens Energy is hiring AI/Machine Learning Engineers for its Gurgaon office under the Digital Products and Solutions (DPS) organization. This full-time opportunity is ideal for entry-level graduates and candidates with up to three years of experience who are passionate about Artificial Intelligence, Machine Learning, Natural Language Processing (NLP), and Generative AI technologies. Candidates with strong Python programming skills and academic or project experience in AI/ML are encouraged to apply.
...
As part of Siemens Energy’s Digital Products and Solutions team, you will work with experienced data scientists, software engineers, and product managers to build intelligent applications that support the global energy industry. This role offers excellent exposure to machine learning pipelines, Generative AI, cloud technologies, backend development, and enterprise AI solutions while contributing to innovative digital products.
